[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 11111111 a
1 11111000 5
2 00001111 4
3 11010111 6
4 10111010 5
5 11111100 6
6 01010000 2
7 01111101 6
